arts.sum: Inside Spain is a weekly instalment brought to you by Football España, providing an insight into all of the major stories coming out of the rich and intense climes of La Liga and beyond. Everything had started to look a lot brighter for Real Madrid again after Barcelona dropped points twice, drawing them within a […] The post Inside Spain: Real Madrid crisis again, the Kylian Mbappe saviour and Alphonso Davies twist appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.sum: Julian Brandt faces a race to be fit for today’s Klassiker as Borussia Dortmund host Bayern Munich in the Bundesliga Topspiel. The 28-year-old was replaced in Die Schwarzgelben’s 3-0 win…

arts.ttl: Attractive football not seen for years? Why Bayern Munich always kept faith in Vincent Kompany
arts.sum: “We are incredibly happy with our coach Vincent Kompany,” said Bayern Munich president Herbert Hainer last month in comments captured by @iMiaSanMia . FIrst-year head coach Vincent Kompany endured a rough stretch earlier this fall that culminated in a blowout defeat to former Bayern coach Hansi Flick and FC Barcelona .

arts.ttl: Saturday's Bundesliga predictions including Borussia Dortmund vs. Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's Bundesliga fixtures, including Borussia Dortmund vs. Bayern Munich.

arts.ttl: Daily Schmankerl: Bayern Munich’s Thomas Müller savoring Der Klassiker showdown with Borussia Dortmund; Bayern eyeing Inter Milan defender; FC Barcelona looking to bolster wing; Federico Chiesa to Inter?; Kim Min-jae recognized for PSG effort; and MORE!
arts.sum: Bayern Munich center-back Kim Min-jae was named to the “ Champions League Team of Matchday 5” by WhoScored.com : Bayern Munich star Thomas Müller has been through his fair share of battles with Borussia Dortmund and while the veteran is not likely to play a major role in today’s match, he can still appreciate the rivalry.

arts.ttl: Manuel Neuer does not fear Bayern’s tough run of games, knows none of the teams “are looking forward to playing us”
arts.sum: Spoken before Bayern Munich ’s tough gauntlet of back-to-back-to-back games against Paris Saint Germain, Borussia Dortmund and Bayer Leverkusen, Neuer radiated confidence at the team’s state of play: Of course, it is difficult to speak about good form about the moment without mentioning the six consecutive clean sheets the team had racked up: “We’ve had clean sheets before, but things are going very well at the moment,” Neuer explained, via @iMiaSanMia .

arts.ttl: Breaking: On-loan Bayern Munich player Gabriel Vidović suffers nasty ankle injury, could be out for around 10 weeks
arts.sum: Mainz recently announced that Vidović had sustained an ankle injury via their official twitter handle : Asked in the pre-match press conference, Mainz head coach Bo Henrikson...actually just completely ignored the inquiry to Vidović’s health.

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund motivated to face Bayern Munich in Der Klassiker
arts.sum: My only focus is on winning tomorrow’s game, I don’t need any statements as motivation for that,” said Sahin. Sahin was among those who heard Uli Hoeneß “promise” that Bayern Munich would win the Bundesliga.
